commands.review_summary:
This PR adds optional `gateway.tailscale.preserveFunnel` config, startup logic to skip `tailscale serve` when an existing Funnel route covers the gateway port, parser coverage, docs, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main always applies `tailscale serve --bg --yes <port>` in serve mode, and Tailscale documents same-port Serve/Funnel as controlled by the latest command. I did not establish a live failing tailnet reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real Tailscale proof or maintainer proof override plus exposure-policy review; there is no narrow automation repair left after the prior code findings were addressed.

target.title: fix(gateway): preserve external Tailscale Funnel routes in serve mode
target.author: renzomxd
